title: triticum turgidum subsp. turgidum
intro: Triticum turgidum subsp. turgidum, also known as durum wheat, is a subspecies of wheat that is a type of hexaploid wheat, characterized by its hard, dense grains. The medicinal properties of durum wheat include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of durum wheat include reducing the risk of heart disease and certain cancers, as well as improving digestion and reducing inflammation. Durum wheat can be prepared through various herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and other health problems.
